ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "opeid6" INTEGER /* OPEID6 identifier for the college */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the college */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the college */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the college's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college offering the major */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the college that offers the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college offering the degree */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the degree program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduates" (
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the graduate attended */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the graduate completed */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree the graduate earned */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the graduate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the graduate */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the graduate */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the graduate */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Whether the graduate is an international student */,
  "earning1yr" INTEGER /* Earnings of the graduate one year after graduation */,
  "hasjob1yr" INTEGER /* Whether the graduate has a job one year after graduation */,
  "nojob1yr" INTEGER /* Whether the graduate does not have a job one year after graduation */,
  "ipeds1" INTEGER /* IPEDS identifier for the graduate one year after graduation */,
  "job_title_1yr" TEXT /* Job title one year after graduation */,
  "company_1yr" TEXT /* Company name one year after graduation */,
  "job_location_1yr" TEXT /* Location of the job one year after graduation */,
  "job_industry_1yr" TEXT /* Industry of the job one year after graduation */,
  "earning2yr" INTEGER /* Earnings of the graduate two years after graduation */,
  "hasjob2yr" INTEGER /* Whether the graduate has a job two years after graduation */,
  "nojob2yr" INTEGER /* Whether the graduate does not have a job two years after graduation */,
  "ipeds2" INTEGER /* IPEDS identifier for the graduate two years after graduation */,
  "job_title_2yr" TEXT /* Job title two years after graduation */,
  "company_2yr" TEXT /* Company name two years after graduation */,
  "job_location_2yr" TEXT /* Location of the job two years after graduation */,
  "job_industry_2yr" TEXT /* Industry of the job two years after graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., college administrator, state education official, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
